title: prunus × fruticans var. fastigiata
intro: Prunus × fruticans var. fastigiata, also known as the Fastigiate Wild Cherry, is a compact, evergreen shrub that is a cultivar of the Prunus × fruticans species. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its bark and leaves, which contain a range of bioactive compounds, including flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Prunus × fruticans var. fastigiata include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation in the body. In herbal preparations, the plant's bark and leaves are often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are traditionally used to treat a range of health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions.
